completed_steps.summary: Classified as monolith backend with 1 part. ASP.NET Core 8.0, Cosmos DB 3.46.1, Auth0 JWT, Ical.Net 5.2.0. 5 assemblies. Reminders/ is stale scaffold.
Found 9 existing docs in docs/ (8 from March 2026 + new compute-instances-algorithm.md), plus README.md, CLAUDE.md, SWAGGER_SETUP.md. No additional user guidance.
Tech stack confirmed: ASP.NET Core 8.0, Cosmos DB 3.46.1, Ical.Net 5.2.0, Auth0 JWT 8.0.11, dotenv.net 3.2.1, xUnit+Moq+FluentAssertions. CI/CD: GitHub Actions to Azure Web Apps.

Exhaustive scan: read all 29 Task assembly files, all 40+ Web assembly files (commands, controllers, DTOs, mappers, middleware), all 16 test files, compute-instances-algorithm.md. 13 commands documented, 4 Cosmos document types, 1 computed model, 12 exceptions, 3 services, 3 repositories.
Generated source-tree-analysis.md with annotated directory tree, assembly dependency graph, critical folders table.
Generated development-guide.md (prerequisites, setup, commands, adding features, conventions, curl examples) and deployment-guide.md (CI/CD pipeline, Azure config, Cosmos setup, troubleshooting).

Generated architecture.md: Command Pattern dispatch (13 commands), Unity Pattern with transactional batch code, Cosmos DB single-container design, recurring task 4-phase computation pipeline, middleware pipeline, DI registration table, validation architecture, testing architecture.

Generated project-overview.md, api-contracts.md (all 13 commands + REST endpoints + DTO reference + error codes table), data-models.md (all 4 Cosmos docs + computed model + state machines + 12 exceptions + service interfaces).
Generated index.md: all 13 commands, quick reference table, links to all 8 docs, compute-instances-algorithm deep dive link, AI development rules summary.
Validation passed: no TODO/PLACEHOLDER/TBD/FIXME/incomplete markers found across all 8 documentation files. User selected finalize.
Workflow complete. 8 documentation files generated/updated in docs/.

project_types.display_name: ASP.NET Core Backend API with Command Pattern + Recurring Tasks
